subcodes.first_line: O cherished remnant of the three sacred martyred souls! Praise be to God that throughout thy life thou hast dwelt beneath the sheltering grace of His Divine Unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یادگار سه نفس مقدس شهید حمد خدا را که در ظل الطاف حضرت احدیت مدت الحیات
subcodes.subjects: @crucifixion; ascension of Christ, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
